notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield singles on a line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. TJ Rumfield to 2nd. TJ Rumfield advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
